facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa sits right on the beach, bungalows steps from the water, open-air restaurants where the breeze does the work. 4.8 stars across 961 reviews. Not luck. Consistency. Two restaurants, a full spa, beachfront villas. Phu Quoc at its quietest and most restorative. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
